title: Generate Random Password
text:
Given length L (4 ≤ L ≤ 20), generate a random password of length L containing lowercase letters, uppercase letters, and digits. Print the password.

Input format:
L

Output format:
A single line

Example:
Input:
8

Output:
aB3dEf7g
(Actual output will vary due to randomness)
starter_code:

solve()
